Curriculum About
SAP Data & Analytics

Future of PMM Training

A Guided Learning Program for Our Product Marketing Team

Welcome

As Dan mentioned in recent Office Hours, we are embarking on a journey to transform the way we approach our jobs with artificial intelligence—both in terms of the company "becoming AI-first" and orienting around delivering agentic applications, and way we approach our product marketing role in light of the rapidly changing business dynamics.

Our goal is nothing short of becoming the most advanced and capable AI PMM team within SAP, and paving the way for the rest of the company to adopt some of our best practices, frameworks, and tool adoption. In that spirit, we have developed a hands-on curriculum with assessments, exercises, and practical frameworks you can apply immediately. It's not a textbook to read — it's a learning journey we can complete together.

What This Is

📚 Guided Learning

Each unit builds on the last, with clear objectives and knowledge checks along the way. You will learn not only about AI tools, but how to think and work alongside AI and approach marketing.

🛠️ Practical Focus

You will leverage exercises that teach you practical frameworks you can apply to actual products and campaigns. This will change the way you work today.

⏱️ Self-Paced

The total course (for now) is about 8 hours total. It comes with online interactive learning units, take-home reading materials, interactive assessments to test your knowledge, and is backed by resources on this website.

📅 Weekly Sessions: Every week, we will host a live educational Teams session to teach the curriculum as we go.

Why We Built This

The way SAP's buyers discover, evaluate, and purchase our software has fundamentally changed. AI tools now mediate the research process. Committees make decisions with AI-generated shortlists. The old playbook — launch, enable, wait for leads — no longer works the way it used to.

We will examine the current funnel and our way of working, and suggest what the new agentic marketing funnel looks like – and how SAP can adapt PMM strategies and work to align to it.

This program teaches the skills our PMMs need to drive impact in this new environment.

Program Overview

Unit Title Funnel Stage Time
1 The Evolution of PMM Foundation 60 min
2 Creating Awareness through AI Discoverability Awareness 60 min
3 Building Positioning that Survives Summarization Consideration 60 min
4 Enabling Champions for Technical Validation Evaluation 60 min
5 Designing Commercial Strategy Commercialization 75 min
6 Navigating Multi-Stakeholder Decisions (Personas) Decision 60 min
7 Driving Adoption, Expansion, and Advocacy Adoption 60 min

Total Program Time: ~8 hours

What You'll Walk Away With

  • A clear understanding of how AI is reshaping B2B buying behavior and what you can do to adapt with AI tools and approaches
  • Practical frameworks for positioning, GTM, and competitive strategy where you can work alongside AI to research, differentiate and deliver powerful messaging and positioning
  • Hands-on experience with exercises you can apply to our own products at SAP
  • Confidence to lead product marketing as an AI-enabled, "10X PMM" who doesn't just use tools to do more, but works with AI to work smarter and better

What is Happening More Broadly at SAP

This is our own teams' effort, and other SAP CMO groups are leading their own efforts to test and learn new tools and approaches. Our hope is that we can move quickly, iterate often, learn from your feedback and help SAP become the leader in AI PMM adoption.

Before You Begin: Baseline Assessments

Before diving into Unit 1, take these two quick assessments to establish your baseline. They'll help you understand where you're starting from and measure your progress as you complete the curriculum.

📊 10x PMM Scorecard

A self-assessment of your current AI adoption across PMM activities. Where are you already using AI effectively? Where are the gaps?

Take the Scorecard →

🧠 Where Do You Sit?

Based on Helen Edwards' "Cognitive Sovereignty" framework. How comfortable are you delegating different types of decisions to AI?

Take the Assessment →

⏱️ Time required: ~10 minutes total for both assessments. Your results will be saved so you can revisit them after completing the curriculum.

Ready to Begin?

Once you've completed the baseline assessments, start with Unit 1 to understand why the PMM role is evolving.

Start Unit 1 →
